audiobook.offlineUnsupported: Offline storage is not available in this browser.
audiobook.freePreviewHelp: Number of opening chapters playable for free.
audiobook.externalUrlHelp: Or link to an external audio file (free / public-domain editions only).
audiobook.split.author: Author
audiobook.splitHelp: Share of the creator payout for each recipient. Must total 100%. Narrators need Stripe payouts configured to receive a share.
audiobook.team.title: Audio book team
audiobook.team.splitHelp: The proposed revenue share is shown to the invitee in their role agreement. Set the actual split in the Audio book pricing section once they have joined and configured Stripe payouts.
audiobook.team.agreement.title: Role agreement
audiobook.team.agreement.error: Could not record your agreement. Please try again.
audiobook.manager.intro: You manage the production of this audio book. Pricing, revenue split, and team are handled by the owner.
audiobook.stats.title: Listening analytics
audiobook.stats.summary: {minutes} minutes listened across {listeners, plural, one {# listener} other {# listeners}}
